overview: NexusApp is a dark-themed creator hub web app with 4 tabs: AI Writer for generating stories and lyrics, a Marketplace for digital goods, a Channel browser for subscribing to top creators, and a Profile screen. Built with a sleek black and red accent design.
features: AI Writer with prompt-based story/lyric generation
Marketplace with product grid and search
Channel browser with subscriber counts and subscribe buttons
User profile with stats and account settings
Dark theme with red accent colors throughout
